items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding status transitions during recovery (degraded -> healthy). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on various actions taken by the business owner and customer interactions, but do not address the specific requirement in question, leading to an inconclusive evaluation.
